errors.write.DEMO_READ_ONLY.title: Demo mode is read-only
errors.write.DEMO_READ_ONLY.body: This is a demo deployment, so changes can't be saved.
errors.write.DEMO_READ_ONLY.hint: Sign in to a tenant deployment to make changes.
errors.write.UNAUTHORIZED.title: Not authorized
errors.write.UNAUTHORIZED.body: You don't have permission to make this change.
errors.write.UNAUTHORIZED.hint: Ask an admin to grant the role you need, or sign in with a different account.
errors.write.NOT_FOUND.title: No longer exists
errors.write.NOT_FOUND.body: The item you were editing has been deleted or moved.
errors.write.NOT_FOUND.hint: Reload to see the latest state.
errors.write.ALREADY_EXISTS.title: Conflict
errors.write.ALREADY_EXISTS.body: Something with the same identifier already exists.
errors.write.ALREADY_EXISTS.hint: Choose a different slug or version and try again.
errors.write.VALIDATION_ERROR.title: Couldn't save
errors.write.VALIDATION_ERROR.body: One or more fields didn't pass validation.
errors.write.VALIDATION_ERROR.hint: Fix the highlighted fields and try again.
errors.write.unknown.title: Something went wrong
errors.write.unknown.hint: Try again in a moment. If it keeps failing, contact your platform team.
